name: Transfer of Certain Credits (Credit Trading)

eligibility.description: Taxpayers with eligible credits (e.g., Energy Credit, Advanced Manufacturing Credit) can transfer them to a transferee. The cash received by the seller is tax-exempt; the buyer cannot deduct the cash paid but receives the full credit value.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows eligible taxpayers to sell certain clean energy tax credits to unrelated third-party taxpayers for cash.
